transcript.text:
TzuMom: My child doesn't eat everything in sight
But she can eat all of this
She can do it
This needs to be listed as a drug
TzuMom: You're eating way too much!
Hello everyone~
I received an advertising offer from Mom's Touch
So I have their burgers here
I have some more in the back too
They're currently doing an event
"PsyBurger 1+1"
If you order 1 of these burgers, you get a coupon
You scratch off for a number and make a submission online
What am I saying? Anyways..
Submit your number to see if you're lucky
I will see how my 2021 will be from this luck

I ordered 10 burgers, so I have 10 coupons
Ta-da
Yellow..?
[Counting the coupons]
I received 11 1 of them says "I'm sneaking 1 in just for you"
It also says that it's a secret Keep this a secret!
Bon appetit
I had my very first PsyBurger back in..
Middle school? High school? It was an eye-opening experience
A very affordable chicken burger
No! Jingu!
That's too big
It's been like half a year for me It's so good
I'm sure all of you tried this at least once
Tasty
I'm spilling everything today

I'll be careful
It's just too big
I don't like cream sauce too much
I always prefer the bulgogi sauce on burgers
But this cream sauce is delicious
The chicken patty is really thick
I'm not just saying it's good because it's a paid promotion
Everyone knows that PsyBurger is good
The cats are rowdy today
[Sniff sniff]
These aren't for you!
Mom's Touch has dark meat and white meat
I eat the dark meat
I really like the deep cheeseburger
But they use white meat (chicken breast)
Oh, wait

To Mom's Touch: I want dark meat for the deep cheeseburger
Oops, I totally forgot about the coupon
I almost forgot about it again!
Let's scratch it off
Using the coin is the best
Let's go
[Try Again]
1 more time
I'm invested now
Do I need to order 100 next time?
[Try Again]
This isn't a good start
Let's go!
Let's try 1 more
Let's go
I have a good feeling about this one

[Try Again]
What is this..
I'm not angry
Looks so good
You need to drink coke for burgers and chickens. Even for pizzas
Back in high school, I would easily eat 3 burgers at fast food places
Burgers don't really fill you up, right?
[Or is that just for me?]
Refreshing
Another one
This is it
[Try Again]
Fail
Now that I think about it
I'm almost 25 already
Jingu wants to jump up but he can't

[Getting his spot back]
[Frustrated]
[Tzuyang's main job: Cat lady]
[Excellent]
Last coupon
Transfer my energy
Wait no, It's the opposite
I need to pray that I won't get it
Why do I even try?
It won't work
It really didn't
I thought I would get at least 1
[Mom's Touch!]
For the 2nd mukbang,
There are 3 types of food from Mom's Touch
These are discounted packs that are out for a limited time

Fries, cheeseballs, chicken pack
Psyburger, bulgogi burger, fries, cheeseballs, 2 drinks pack
Psyburger, cheeseball, cajun chicken poppers, 1 drink pack
But I just had 10 Psyburgers just now
I will give these 2 burgers to my editor and PD
And I'll eat the rest
Hey, that's cute!
Teddy bear
This is an alien
So good
I just had a small bite
It's like a very glutinous rice donut
It's like cream cheese, so it didn't get hard even if it got cold
It's good Really sweet
1 by 1 even the bear
The outer part is tasty Like powder? bun?

[Now for the fried chicken]
[Cajun chicken poppers]
[in for a bite]
I know this sauce
It's very familiar
I would order this again
Wait, probably everything
Leg first for the chicken
I love it
It's a salty and spicy batter
[Twist and turn]
[Finishing it up as a toothbrush]
If it's salty, take a cheeseball
Can't just grab 1 fry
It's rice cake
I want more

There's more!
The rice cake does it all
It has every shape
This looks like a chicken
[Destroyed]
It's wasteful to eat this in 1 bite
I forgot about this burger
I love it
A beautiful bulgogi burger
This is so much easier to eat
I should've saved some
3-second rule
I like boneless
But I think a lot more people prefer their chicken like this
Wings
Oops, I ate the leg and wing already This was half a chicken

It's not bad at all
So good
Uh oh
I ate everything that I like
That's huge
100% chicken breast
I used to really hate this
Well, now too
I'm eating a lot of chicken today
Wait, I had 5 chickens before
[Last cheeseball] Oh no!
This is the best
Let's save it
1 last rice cake left too
[Finishing up the chicken first]
It's chewy Maybe because it got cold

Which part of the chicken is this?
Not chicken breast
Yummy
Finished
I will eat the cheeseball last
No!
My new clothes
Last cheeseball
Tasty
I ate the PsyBurgers and the Mom's Touch packs
I didn't get picked for the coupons,
But that means you guys have a higher chance
So I guess that's a good thing
I think the packs were really good for couples or even for a family
It'd be a nice meal to take home for family members
Thanks everyone~
Happy New Year!! [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
